ModMetaData.name: Ascension Megacorp
ModMetaData.description:
Ascension Megacorp brings U.S.A.C. (United Stellar Armament Company) to RimWorld, delivering a high-tech faction experience centered on corporate contracts, financial pressure, and mechanized force projection.
- Adds the USAC faction, background lore, and a new start scenario. - Adds multiple USAC mech types (light / heavy / humanoid / quadruped), plus a Readiness maintenance system; low readiness reduces combat effectiveness and requires regular resupply. - Adds USAC orbital traders and mech suppliers with exclusive stock pools and orbital mech purchasing. - Adds a unique USAC trade economy that uses Bodybags and Credit Bonds as transaction currency. - Adds debt-focused gameplay (including debt-start scenarios), loan/repayment flow, and USAC portal service pages. - Adds custom events, including USAC mech supplier arrivals and USAC mining raids. - Optional integrations: Biotech, Ideology, and The Deadman's Switch (enables additional integrated content). - Built-in compatibility: Combat Extended.
